metadata.title: 4o4 — Software that ships, not promises | Web & mobile (Amman)
metadata.description: 4o4 is a software team in Amman building web apps, mobile apps, and workflow automation for serious founders in Jordan and the region. Clean code, clear timelines, no surprises.
metadata.keywords: software development, startups, custom web applications, mobile app development, MVP, web apps, Jordan software company, Amman developers, MENA tech, workflow automation, n8n, UI UX, cloud deployment, ASP.NET, React, React Native
metadata.openGraphTitle: 4o4 — Your idea deserves software that actually works
metadata.openGraphDescription: We build web apps, mobile apps, and automation for serious founders in Jordan and the region. Clear timelines, code that lasts, no black boxes.
metadata.twitterTitle: 4o4 — Software that ships, from Amman to the region
metadata.twitterDescription: Web apps, mobile apps, and automation — delivered on time and built to last.

jsonLd.organizationDescription: Software development team in Amman, Jordan — building web apps, mobile apps, and workflow automation for serious founders in Jordan and the MENA region. Clean code, clear timelines, confident delivery.

hero.imageAlt: Warm gradient background behind the 4o4 hero section
hero.descriptionMid: — have an idea or project that deserves more than spreadsheets and workarounds? We build it with you:
hero.descriptionScope: web app, mobile app, or workflow automation
hero.descriptionEnd: — production-ready, with clear timelines and no surprises. Serving serious founders in Jordan and the region.
hero.ctaContact: Book a call — 30 minutes is enough

projects.intro: Over {count} projects delivered to real founders in Jordan and the region — marketplaces, internal tools, mobile apps, and automation. All running in production today. Open a card for scope and outcome; live links open in a new tab.

cashtics.title: Cashtics
cashtics.subtitle: Freelance marketplace
cashtics.description: A task marketplace connecting flexible workers with businesses posting short jobs — professional profiles, escrow-style payment flows, and an operator dashboard to review everything in one step.
cashtics.result: Growing user base with steady month-over-month task volume since launch
cashtics.imageAlt: Cashtics freelance marketplace web app interface preview in 4o4 portfolio

sooquk.title: Sooquk
sooquk.subtitle: Regional e-commerce
sooquk.description: A Jordan-focused storefront for fashion and lifestyle sellers — organized catalog, stable checkout, practical vendor tools, and fast mobile performance tuned for where most of your customers shop.
sooquk.result: Active vendors and stable checkout running in production since launch
sooquk.imageAlt: Sooquk e-commerce marketplace screenshot for Jordan retailers by 4o4

okal.title: Okal for Heroes
okal.subtitle: Kids barber booking
okal.description: Appointment booking and shop operations for a kids' barber brand — automated reminders, digital coupons, organized ticketing, and a parent-friendly mobile experience with no calls or back-and-forth.
okal.result: Strong early adoption from families in launch neighborhoods within weeks
okal.imageAlt: Okal for Heroes booking experience designed by 4o4

breshta.title: Breshta
breshta.subtitle: Loyalty & rewards
breshta.description: A loyalty system that brings customers back in a way that feels genuine — daily deals, birthday surprises, and light gamification that keeps them engaged. No brittle scripts, no offers that feel fake.
breshta.result: Over 3,500 active users returning through loyalty loops
breshta.imageAlt: Breshta loyalty app screen from 4o4 client work

lastonewin.title: LastOneWin
lastonewin.subtitle: Live competition game
lastonewin.description: A real-time 'last finger on screen' competition — rooms, sessions, and resilient sync that handles traffic spikes during campaign windows without lag or crashes that ruin the experience.
lastonewin.result: Over 3,000 live concurrent players at peak without a single failure
lastonewin.imageAlt: LastOneWin real-time mobile game promotional artwork in 4o4 portfolio

ilern.title: ILern
ilern.subtitle: Learning platform
ilern.description: A full learning platform — structured courses, easy enrollment, instructor tools, and digital certificates. Clear roles for admins, teachers, and students, with data that's auditable at any time.
ilern.result: Over 800 students learning on a single reliable consolidated stack
ilern.imageAlt: ILern LMS dashboard and course view built by 4o4

clinical.title: Clinical desktop suite
clinical.subtitle: Full clinic management
clinical.description: Patient records, appointment scheduling, and a complete billing cycle for clinic teams — desktop-first interfaces, keyboard-optimized, where accuracy matters more than visual flair.
clinical.result: Daily operations for over 1,000 patients on a single reliable database
clinical.imageAlt: Healthcare management desktop UI sample from 4o4 delivery work

about.p1: A lot of teams have been burned before: a developer who promised then disappeared, or a big agency that took your budget and handed you a junior who rediscovers your project every week. We're not that. Since 2025, every project we build ships to production — clean code, timelines you can actually plan around, and communication that never goes dark.
about.p2: A small team means you talk to whoever is actually building, not a manager translating your words. Designer and engineer side by side — faster decisions, cleaner code. Browse

values.title: Clarity
values.desc: Written scope before the first line of code — no 'we'll see' or fuzzy boundaries

values.title: Craft
values.desc: Code you can live with two years from now, not code that merely works

values.title: Partnership
values.desc: You're part of every decision, not discovering them on delivery day

values.title: Momentum
values.desc: We ship early because the market teaches you more than any meeting

services.intro: From idea to launch — we build what you actually need, with no scope bloat and no invoice surprises. Every service comes with a clear timeline you can plan around.
services.ctaTitle: Your project is too big to evaluate alone
services.ctaBody: In 30 minutes we'll define scope, risks, and the first sensible milestone together. No commitment — and if we're not the right team, we'll tell you straight.

list.title: Web development
list.subtitle: Custom web applications
list.description: Got a product living inside a spreadsheet or manual processes? We turn it into a web app that works, scales, and ships on time. From marketing sites to multi-tenant SaaS — APIs, permissions, and frontends that grow with you.

list.title: Mobile apps
list.subtitle: iOS, Android & cross-platform
list.description: Your users are on mobile — so your product needs to be there. We build native or cross-platform apps ready for the stores, with backend integration and authentication from day one.

list.title: UI / UX design
list.subtitle: Interfaces that match how users think
list.description: You see the product before it's built — wireframes and UI your team reviews early. Fewer surprises at implementation, faster feedback loops. Design and engineering aligned from prototype to production.

list.title: Brand & identity
list.subtitle: User trust starts before the first deploy
list.description: For startups, brand is what makes users trust you before they even try. We build a visual voice, core assets, and in-product patterns that stay consistent with every growth step.

list.title: Cloud & DevOps
list.subtitle: Infrastructure that fits your stage now and grows with you
list.description: Deploy to AWS or Azure with environments, CI/CD, and monitoring right-sized for your current scale — no enterprise-sized clusters on day one, with real room to grow when traffic proves it.

list.title: Workflow automation (n8n)
list.subtitle: How many hours a day do you lose moving data manually?
list.description: We stop that waste — replacing manual handoffs between your CRM, sheets, and email with reliable n8n flows that are documented, testable, and fully owned by your team after delivery.

testimonials.eyebrow: Results — in the words of those who lived them
testimonials.subtitle: Founders, managers, and users who paid for real results — and the results speak for themselves.

items.quote: I posted my first task on Cashtics and had three offers within two hours. The platform is fast, easy to use, and the payment process felt secure. I've now completed over 40 tasks through it. Never expected this kind of traction so early.
items.author: Khaled Al-Rawi

items.quote: I opened my shop on Sooquk expecting maybe 20–30 visitors a month. Within the first few weeks I was getting hundreds of views. The site loads fast even on mobile, which makes a huge difference for my customers.
items.author: Rima Mansour

items.quote: Booking used to mean phone calls, back-and-forth, and sometimes showing up to a full shop. Now parents just pick a slot and get a reminder before the appointment. The coupon system was a nice touch — our regulars really appreciate it.
items.author: Khalil Okal

items.quote: I open Breshta every morning just to spin the wheel. It sounds simple, but the birthday gift I got last month was a genuinely nice surprise. The deals feel real — not just filler. I've recommended it to at least 10 friends.
items.author: Sara Wahdan

items.quote: I was in a room with over 2,000 players and it didn't lag once. The tension of being one of the last five was actually thrilling. I've played a lot of live games — nothing handles concurrent players this smoothly.
items.author: Faris Nader

items.quote: I finished my certification in six weeks completely online. The course material was well-organized, the instructor portal made it easy to track my progress, and I never ran into a bug or a broken link. That's rare for a platform this new.
items.author: Layla Hassan

items.quote: Before this system our team was juggling paper files and spreadsheets. Now every patient record is one search away, billing is automatic, and appointment conflicts are basically gone. Onboarding took less than a week.
items.author: Dr. Hani Zureikat

process.eyebrow: No black boxes — this is our process
process.intro: Four clear phases — every week you know where we are and what's next. Because missing communication is where most software problems actually start.

steps.title: Discovery
steps.description: We align on goals, users, constraints, and success metrics before any code. We don't start until everyone is on the same page — because changing things on paper is far cheaper than changing them in code.

steps.title: Design
steps.description: You see the product before it's built — wireframes and UI your team reviews early. Ideas change in Figma, not in production.

steps.title: Development
steps.description: Iterative builds with tangible progress every week — APIs, frontends or apps, and automated checks. No 'everything is ready on delivery day'.

steps.title: Launch
steps.description: We launch with you, stabilize with you, and hand over ownership with full confidence — until your team runs the system without needing us for every small thing.

contact.eyebrow: Your idea deserves more than 'we'll be in touch'
contact.intro: Share what's on your mind — an idea, a project, or a problem. We reply within 24 hours with clear next steps, not empty sales pitches. And if we're not the right team, we'll say so straight. Use the form for details or book a slot if you'd rather talk directly.
contact.responseValue: 24 hours — even if the answer is no.
contact.name: Name
contact.topicNew: Starting a new project from scratch
contact.topicExisting: Developing or rescuing an existing project
contact.topicExistingMeeting: Continuing an existing project with us
contact.topicConsult: Consultation — not sure where to start
contact.footnoteMessage: We'll reply within 24 hours with clear next steps.
contact.footnoteMeeting: Available Sun – Thu, 9 AM – 6 PM. We confirm within a few hours.
contact.errorGeneric: Something went wrong — please try again or email us directly.
contact.errorFailed: Submission failed — check your connection and try again.

footer.blurb: From Amman — for the founder who wants software that works, not promises. Web apps, mobile apps, and workflow automation.
